title: Vicloon Baby Nail Kit, 5-in-1 Baby Nail Care Set, Baby Nail Care Tool, Baby Manicure Set Includes Nail Clippers, Scissor, Earpick, Nail File and Tweezer for Newborn Infant Toddler
features: 【5-in-1 Set】Contains everything for nail care: nail clippers, nail files, nail scissors, tweezers and ear picks.
【Safe for Babies】Made of high quality stainless steel and pp material, it is safe for babies.Tips are rounded, edges are curved.Fine blade for painless nail cut.

【Easy to Use & Clean】The newborn grooming kit is specially designed for babies. Ergonomic handles to avoid slipping and convenient for you to use. It can be easily cleaned with water and can also be disinfected with alcohol or ultraviolet light.

【Portable Packaging】The nail set is extremely lightweight and small, all tools are packed in a small box, it is convenient to store and take. You can carried it in a purse or handbag when you are outdoors or traveling. Keep your small nails neat and tidy anytime, anywhere.

【Ideal Baby Gift】Suitable for both baby boys and girls, great for baby shower gifts, birthday and Christmas presents. Also, it is the ideal gift for expecting mums or first-time parents. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us , we are always here for you.
description: Product Description The Baby Care Kit Will Always Give Your Baby The Best Protection. Let's face reality and let mum and dad give safe care to the children. Babies also need to be kept clean at all times, especially for first-time mothers and fathers! So you need our baby care kit, complete! Safety! durable! Is worth! HOW TO USE THE 5 GADGETS IN THE SHELL Nail Clippers for Children The large hole handle can be comfortably held in the hands of adults, the non-slip handle and the round head design can prevent the baby from getting hurt. You can trim the edges and peel off the nails without worrying about the terrible click. Nail clipper The ergonomic handle offers a firmer grip and better control when trimming, folding and overlapping the blades, making it easy to trim your baby's nails from almost any angle. Baby Nose Clip With non-slip raised handle, easy to grasp, round tip design, easy to clean, such as pick up nail fragments, clean baby's nose or navel. Nail File and Toothpick for Baby's Ears The handle adopts round hole design, convenient to carry. Using safe materials, it can gently enter the baby's ears, and it is not easy to harm the baby. Perfect size fits baby's little fingers and toes, the safest way to modify baby's nails. Babies have small, sharp nails, which should be clipped regularly. Children can be injured or scratched unknowingly. As we all know, many new parents are afraid of cutting their baby's nails. Fortunately, Vicloon's high-quality nail kit can help you eliminate all fears.
